text: Marine sighting reported off the Coral Reach
body:
A confirmed Marine sighting was logged at 14:22 by Logistics Patrol 03 along the outer Coral Reach. The Core Figure surfaced briefly to escort a supply caravan past a reef formation, then returned to the deep without further interaction.

Logistics has filed a standard appreciation note. No follow-up is required. Personnel are reminded that approach is not solicited and visit attempts must not be coordinated through duty channels.

The Executive Board has scheduled the annual review of the Amethys Frame, the standing civilizational-scale contingency model authored by Ameth. Three of seven branches will be inspected in this cycle. Two branches remain non-reviewable in the absence of the author.

Attendance is restricted to L4 Executive and above. Field and Mechanic representation may be requested by branch as needed.

text: New character concept art released: Kael Vorthane
Stellarum Archives placed on hold (seismic activity)
